_publications._publicationTitle: MAF mediates crosstalk between Ras-MAPK and mTOR signaling in NF1.

_contextSnippet: Flow cytometric analysis of PI and Annexin stained S462-TY cells transduced with MAF for 48 hours revealed increased apoptotic cell death
details: MAF transduction for 48 hours revealed increased apoptotic cell death by flow cytometric analysis
